summary: Benchmark redesign testing for 5 page types (Packages, Intelligence, Specialty Rooms, Locations, Case Studies). Backend APIs all passing (12/12 tests). UI testing results: Packages (PASS), Specialty Rooms (PASS), Intelligence (PASS). CRITICAL ISSUES found: 1) Location pages use old static design instead of new dynamic template (static routes override [slug]), 2) Case Studies API returns 404 (data in 'projects' collection not 'case_studies').

critical.issue: Returns 404 for valid slugs like 'palm-jumeirah-penthouse'. API looks in 'case_studies' MongoDB collection but data is in 'projects' collection.

integration_issues.issue: Static location pages (palm-jumeirah/, emirates-hills/, etc.) in /app/frontend/app/locations/ override the dynamic [slug]/page.tsx template. The old design is shown instead of the new benchmark redesign.
Page loads but data is empty (title, location, year missing) because /api/case-studies/{slug} returns 404. The API endpoint looks in wrong MongoDB collection.

sections_verified: Hero with category badge & IQ Points

locations_detail_page.issue: Static page serves old design. Dynamic [slug]/page.tsx not being used. Need to delete static location folders.

case_studies_detail_page.issue: API returns 404, page shows empty data. Backend API looks in 'case_studies' collection but data is in 'projects' collection.

endpoints_verified: GET /api/locations/palm-jumeirah - enriched with feature_cards, faqs, brands
GET /api/packages/property-types/luxury-villas-mansions - enriched with feature_cards, faqs, brands, tiers

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Case Studies API - either migrate project data to 'case_studies' collection OR update /api/case-studies/{slug} endpoint to fallback to 'projects' collection

HIGH: Delete static location page folders to allow dynamic [slug]/page.tsx to serve the new benchmark design. Folders to remove: /app/frontend/app/locations/palm-jumeirah/, emirates-hills/, downtown-dubai/, dubai-hills/, jumeirah-golf-estates/, abu-dhabi/, sharjah/
critical_code_review_comments: In Next.js, static routes (named folders like 'palm-jumeirah/') take precedence over dynamic routes ([slug]/). The 7 static location page folders need to be deleted.
Case studies data architecture mismatch - /api/case-studies/{slug} endpoint queries 'case_studies' collection but enriched case study data was seeded into 'projects' collection

success_rate.frontend: 60% (3/5 pages working: Packages, Specialty Rooms, Intelligence)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for benchmark redesign all working. Packages, Specialty Rooms, Intelligence detail pages working with enriched data (feature_cards, faqs, brands). Location pages need static folders deleted. Case Studies needs API fix to query 'projects' collection instead of 'case_studies'. All data-testid attributes properly implemented on working pages.
